channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-20027] conf-sanity test_5h: BUG: kernel NULL pointer dereference
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Xiao Yang <xyang@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/89563a57-0a60-4cb1-ae64-ab2936cd1290

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/122777 - 5.14.0-503.40.1.el9_5.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/122777 - 5.14.0-503.40.1_lustre.el9.x86_64

[ 1467.127075] BUG: kernel NULL pointer dereference, address: 0000000000000060
[ 1467.127084] #PF: supervisor read access in kernel mode
[ 1467.127086] #PF: error_code(0x0000) - not-present page
[ 1467.127088] PGD 103604067 P4D 0
[ 1467.127092] Oops: 0000 1 PREEMPT SMP NOPTI
[ 1467.127095] CPU: 0 PID: 84065 Comm: ll_mgs_0001 Kdump: loaded Tainted: G OE ------- — 5.14.0-503.40.1_lustre.el9.x86_64 #1
[ 1467.127098] Hardware name: Red Hat KVM/RHEL, BIOS 1.16.3-4.el9 04/01/2014
[ 1467.127100] RIP: 0010:qsd_op_end+0x91/0x330 [lquota]
[ 1467.127132] Code: c7 05 77 64 04 00 01 00 00 00 48 c7 05 74 64 04 00 00 00 00 00 e8 af b5 40 ff 48 85 db 0f 84 35 02 00 00 48 8b 83 80 00 00 00 <f6> 40 60 02 0f 84 8d 00 00 00 f6 05 86 6b 41 ff 01 0f 84 6b 01 00
[ 1467.127135] RSP: 0018:ff5472d940cdfb48 EFLAGS: 00010286
[ 1467.127137] RAX: 0000000000000000 RBX: ff1ccc156b450600 RCX: ffff0a00ffffff04
[ 1467.127139] RDX: 0000000000000000 RSI: ff1ccc15693a5000 RDI: ff1ccc1549d92a00
[ 1467.127141] RBP: ff1ccc156e202b70 R08: 000000000000000a R09: ff1ccc16693a4f1d
[ 1467.127143] R10: ffffffffffffffff R11: 000000000000000f R12: ff1ccc156d22ebc0
[ 1467.127144] R13: 0000000000000000 R14: ff1ccc156a790000 R15: ff1ccc154531ae50
[ 1467.127148] FS: 0000000000000000(0000) GS:ff1ccc15bba00000(0000) knlGS:0000000000000000
[ 1467.127150] CS: 0010 DS: 0000 ES: 0000 CR0: 0000000080050033
[ 1467.127152] CR2: 0000000000000060 CR3: 0000000105672005 CR4: 0000000000771ef0
[ 1467.127156] PKRU: 55555554
[ 1467.127157] Call Trace:
[ 1467.127160] <TASK>
[ 1467.127162] ? srso_alias_return_thunk+0x5/0xfbef5
[ 1467.127169] ? show_trace_log_lvl+0x26e/0x2df
[ 1467.127176] ? show_trace_log_lvl+0x26e/0x2df
[ 1467.127183] ? osd_trans_stop+0x35e/0x850 [osd_ldiskfs]
[ 1467.127218] ? __die_body.cold+0x8/0xd
[ 1467.127222] ? page_fault_oops+0x134/0x170
[ 1467.127228] ? exc_page_fault+0x62/0x150
[ 1467.127234] ? asm_exc_page_fault+0x22/0x30
[ 1467.127241] ? qsd_op_end+0x91/0x330 [lquota]
[ 1467.127272] ? qsd_op_end+0x81/0x330 [lquota]
[ 1467.127302] osd_trans_stop+0x35e/0x850 [osd_ldiskfs]
[ 1467.127336] ? srso_alias_return_thunk+0x5/0xfbef5
[ 1467.127339] ? osd_write+0x10d/0x4a0 [osd_ldiskfs]
[ 1467.127374] nidtbl_update_version+0x21c/0x540 [mgs]
[ 1467.127402] mgs_nidtbl_write+0x1aa/0x420 [mgs]
[ 1467.127426] mgs_ir_update+0x7b/0x2a0 [mgs]
[ 1467.127451] mgs_target_reg+0x92f/0x1b60 [mgs]
[ 1467.127482] ? srso_alias_return_thunk+0x5/0xfbef5
[ 1467.127486] ? req_capsule_server_pack+0x1f1/0x2c0 [ptlrpc]
[ 1467.127649] ? srso_alias_return_thunk+0x5/0xfbef5
[ 1467.127655] tgt_handle_request0+0x147/0x770 [ptlrpc]
[ 1467.127824] tgt_request_handle+0x3fd/0xd00 [ptlrpc]
[ 1467.127999] ptlrpc_server_handle_request.isra.0+0x2e5/0xd80 [ptlrpc]
[ 1467.128155] ? srso_alias_return_thunk+0x5/0xfbef5
[ 1467.128160] ptlrpc_main+0x9bf/0xea0 [ptlrpc]
[ 1467.128325] ? __pfx_ptlrpc_main+0x10/0x10 [ptlrpc]
[ 1467.128483] kthread+0xdd/0x100
[ 1467.128489] ? __pfx_kthread+0x10/0x10
[ 1467.128494] ret_from_fork+0x29/0x50
[ 1467.128502] </TASK>
[ 1467.128503] Modules linked in: osp(OE) mdd(OE) lod(OE) mdt(OE) lfsck(OE) mgs(OE) mgc(OE) osd_ldiskfs(OE) ldiskfs(OE) lquota(OE) lustre(OE) mdc(OE) lov(OE) osc(OE) lmv(OE) fid(OE) fld(OE) ksocklnd(OE) ptlrpc(OE) obdclass(OE) lnet(OE) libcfs(OE) dm_flakey dm_mod intel_rapl_msr intel_rapl_common kvm_amd rpcsec_gss_krb5 ccp auth_rpcgss nfsv4 dns_resolver nfs kvm lockd grace fscache netfs rfkill iTCO_wdt iTCO_vendor_support i2c_i801 i2c_smbus pcspkr lpc_ich virtio_balloon joydev sunrpc drm fuse ext4 mbcache jbd2 ahci libahci crct10dif_pclmul crc32_pclmul crc32c_intel libata ghash_clmulni_intel virtio_net net_failover failover virtio_blk serio_raw
[ 1467.128567] CR2: 0000000000000060
item.summary: conf-sanity test_5h: BUG: kernel NULL pointer dereference

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
